data.title: Microservices
data.description: Adopting a microservices architecture allows for modular deployment and scalability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes containerization and orchestration tools like Kubernetes.

data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: The site leverages cloud computing to ensure reliability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Hosted on Azure, leveraging IaaS and PaaS offerings.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Implements CDNs to enhance site load speeds globally.
data.technical_spec: Uses Azure CDN solutions to cache content closer to users.

data.title: API-Driven Design
data.description: APIs used to integrate various services and data sources seamlessly.

data.title: Scalable Data Storage
data.description: Adopts scalable databases for efficient data management.
data.technical_spec: Combines SQL and NoSQL databases for flexibility.
